text:
Demographics

Please could you help us better understand the diversity and inclusivity of our participants (and thus how well our data is applicable to the general population) by completing the questions below.

All questions are optional, you do not have to answer if you'd prefer not to (just select "Prefer not to say", if that is the case or leave your age blank). It really does help us if you answer these questions, however, as it allows us to understand how different demographic details change how people view swear words, but please don't feel under pressure to answer if you would prefer not to.

1. Please enter your age (in years)
(the input only accepts numbers e.g., 21)

answers: Man|Woman|Non-Binary|Trans|In a way not listed|Prefer not to say
